claims.headline: Eugeroic-class compound
claims.notesSentence: Fladrafinil is part of the eugeroic (wakefulness-promoting) family of compounds developed at Lafon Laboratories alongside adrafinil and modafinil.

claims.headline: Bisfluoro analog of adrafinil
claims.notesSentence: Fladrafinil (CRL-40,941) is the bisfluoroadrafinil structural analog of adrafinil, which is itself a prodrug of modafinil.
